services.title: Residential Solar Rooftop
services.description: Lower your monthly BESCOM bill. Ideal for Bangalore homes and villas looking to claim central solar subsidies with complete net-metering approvals.

services.title: Commercial & Industrial Solar
services.description: Reduce operational costs and claim 40% accelerated depreciation tax benefits for your office, retail outlet, or factory in Peenya or Whitefield.

services.title: Solar Water Pumps
services.description: Reliable grid-independent solar pumps for farms and lands around rural Bangalore, ensuring uninterrupted watering and crop irrigation.

faq.question: How much subsidy can I get for residential solar in Bangalore?
faq.answer: Under the PM Surya Ghar scheme, you can get a central subsidy of up to ₹78,000 for a 3kW system. Our team handles the entire documentation and portal registration process for you.

faq.question: How long does BESCOM net metering approval take?
faq.answer: BESCOM approvals and net meter installation typically take 3 to 4 weeks. Our team coordinates directly with BESCOM officers to manage all applications and liaison approvals.

copywriting.hero_title: Trusted Rooftop Solar Installer in Bangalore
copywriting.hero_subtitle: Save on monthly BESCOM bills with high-efficiency solar systems designed for Bangalore homes, apartments, and commercial rooftops.
copywriting.about_title: Helping Bangalore Homes & Businesses Reduce Electricity Costs
copywriting.about_text: At Karnataka Green Energy, led by Kiran Kumar, we understand the rising power costs in Karnataka. We design and install durable, subsidy-approved solar systems for property owners in Jayanagar, Koramangala, Indiranagar, and Peenya. We handle everything from BESCOM net-metering approvals to government solar subsidy processing, ensuring complete peace of mind and long-term savings.

testimonials.name: Amit Sharma
testimonials.quote: Karnataka Green Energy installed a 5kW system for our home in Jayanagar. Our bill fell from ₹8,000 a month to just ₹600! Kiran and his team handled the entire BESCOM net-metering paperwork and the government subsidy.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Patel
testimonials.quote: Industrial power rates in Peenya were hurting our margins. Karnataka Green designed a customized 15kW rooftop array. Our commercial power bills dropped by 50% from the first month itself.
